text.p: West Coast, Eastern Eyre Peninsula, Flinders and North West Pastoral districts.
The State Emergency Service advises that people should:
* Keep clear of fallen power lines.
* Beware of fallen trees or debris on the road.
* Don't drive, ride or walk through flood water.
* Keep clear of creeks and storm drains.

Check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts. Warnings are also available through TV and Radio broadcasts or call 1300 659 210. The Bureau and State Emergency Service would appreciate warnings being broadcast regularly.

forecast-period.text: Severe thunderstorms have eased in the eastern parts of the North West Pastoral and northern parts of the Eyre Peninsula.

text.p: Weather Situation: A cloud band with embedded thunderstorms is moving through central parts of the state. It produced heavier rainfalls in the first part of the evening, but has now eased.

hazard.text: West Coast, Eastern Eyre Peninsula, Flinders and North West Pastoral
